— Why Picco

Pick the room before you arrive.

Clear room types, visible pricing and actual studio imagery help you choose a space without a long back-and-forth.

Transparent rates Four room types Real studio views
01 / Space

Rooms for different shoots.

Use the cyclorama, selfie studio, podcast room or Picco Motel depending on the kind of content you need to make.

02 / Support

The basics are ready.

Lighting, backdrops, props, a make-up room and setup assistance are part of the booking flow.

03 / Booking

Pricing is easy to scan.

Hourly, half-day and full-day options are visible before you call, so planning the shoot is faster.

A studio
built for making.

Picco is a for-hire photo & video studio with large versatile spaces, themed sets and selfie booths — perfect for personal projects, professional & commercial work, brand activations and events.

By the hour Half day · 4 hrs Full day · 8 hrs

Four worlds.
One roof.

Each studio at Picco is its own little universe. Pick the one that fits your shoot — or take them all.

Studio 01

Playground.

A versatile multi-set studio with interchangeable backdrops, movable screens and a full cyclorama wall. Bare, flexible, ready for anything you can throw at it.

cycloramabasic lightingbackdropssetup helpmakeup room
First hour₹3,000
Extra hour₹2,000
Half day · 4h₹8,000
Full day · 8h₹14,000
Studio 02

Snap-o-rama.

A self-portrait studio designed for individuals to capture stunning images with complete creative control. Couples, fashion, pets — just about anyone.

self-portraitchanging roomretouched printsraw files
30 min · 5 prints₹2,000
1 hour · 10 prints₹3,500
Studio 03

Jam Room.

A sound-insulated room built for professional audio recording with full video options. Designed for podcasts, interviews and long-format conversations.

sound insulatedpro micsvideo readyseating sets
First hour₹4,000
Extra hour₹2,500
Half day · 4h₹10,000
Venue · 1h₹2,500

Motel.
